summary: Raw, powerful performance captured on a beautifully pure recording, highlighted by an explosive Bertha opener.
review: The reviewer gushes about the sheer energy and "power" of the April 12‑1978 show, calling it unfalteringly beautiful and praising the opening burst of Bertha. While no concrete technical details are given, the recording is described as pure and vivid, suggesting a high‑quality source even though its exact type isn’t identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly enthusiastic review; strong praise for the show but no concrete recording‑technical data, so rating leans high but confidence remains low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the audio "pure" and "beautiful," implying clear sound, but provides no specifics about source (soundboard/audience) or any issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening described as a powerful, un‑timid burst that set the tone for an energetic night.
